name: Films
description: Long-form cinema audio (~90-180 min). Library density 20, fine density 40 -- audfprint defaults.

name: TV episodes
description: Episodic series audio (~22-60 min). Same tuning as films.

name: YouTube videos
description: Long-form YouTube audio (no length cap). Same tuning as films.

name: YouTube Shorts
description: ~60s reference clips. min_count=3 lets a 5-10s query trigger a hit; the audfprint default of 5 tends to NOMATCH at this length.

name: Instagram Reels
description: Same shape as YouTube Shorts -- short reference clips, lower min_count for sub-clip queries.
